title: trev's custom origins: arvonian
description: (iron's spellbooks required) a addon for the origins that adds a adaptive and evolving origin
body:
this addon adds the arvonian addon which adds a origin that can adapt and evolve over time
taking patience to become powerful some being easier while some face far greater challenges


(also credit to Estatrix from discord for assisting with the code)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

fyi primary ability is used for attacks don't crouch for main attack and crouch for power attack and secondary ability is used for assimilating while unadapted
